no-restricted-syntax.message: ❌ Direct color values are prohibited. Use design tokens from @/tokens/colors instead. Example: colorTokens.signal.primary
❌ Direct color values in template literals are prohibited. Use design tokens from @/tokens/colors instead.
❌ Hardcoded pixel values are prohibited. Use spacing tokens from @/tokens/spacing instead. Example: spacingTokens[4] for 16px
❌ Hardcoded duration values are prohibited. Use motion tokens from @/tokens/motion instead. Example: motionTokens.duration.normal

no-restricted-properties.message: ❌ Inline color styles are prohibited. Use Tailwind classes with design tokens or styled-components with token imports.
❌ Inline background-color styles are prohibited. Use Tailwind classes with design tokens.
❌ Inline margin styles are prohibited. Use Tailwind spacing classes based on 8px grid.
❌ Inline padding styles are prohibited. Use Tailwind spacing classes based on 8px grid.

patterns.message: ❌ Do not import index.css directly. Design tokens are globally available via Tailwind.
